title: Help Us Improve - Get Advanced File Gallery for Free!

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Want to get Advanced File Gallery for free, for a lifetime?

We’re offering free access to our app for the first 5 people who give us their honest feedback.

If you like to have your files more organized, this post is for you. Advanced File Gallery allows you to organize your files into meaningful collections, making them more manageable.

If you love testing out new tools and don’t mind sharing a few thoughts on your experience, we’d love to hear from you. Your input will help us shape the app and make it even better for everyone.

How it works - Feedback Trial Rules:

  1. Reach out first
    Comment on this post or send us a DM to get access to an extended 3-month trial of Advanced File Gallery.

  2. Feedback after 2 weeks & month
    We’ll ask for your first impressions after 2 weeks. After your first month, we’ll send you a short feedback form (nothing too fancy, promise). If you need more time to explore the app - no pressure! Just let us know and we’ll follow up later.

  3. Give us your thoughts, get it for free
    If you give us valuable feedback and complete the form, you’ll receive lifetime access to Advanced File Gallery - for free!

If you’re interested, drop a comment here or send me a DM.

Thanks for being part of our journey

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Bump! We still have 4 testing spots left!

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: This sounds like a great opportunity! I’m always looking for better ways to organize files, and I’d be happy to test it out and share my feedback. Count me in!

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! I’ll send you DM here

posts.author: khonan (Kim Honan)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to test it out if you still have a spot open!

posts.author: kevin.work (kevin.work)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! nice app there, would love to try and help out!

question: is this available as a widget within an item? (not as Board view)
i have some projects where each item consist of alot of photos, and i would like to view them inside an item, not in the entire board view

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! Check your DM’s on community soon, I’ll send you more details there

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re currently working on that! This feature should be released next week

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Great, I’ll send you a DM here on community shortly!
